mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_refresh_token ( user_id, token_hash, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at, replaced_by_token_id, device_info, ip_address ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{revokedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{replacedByTokenId}, #{deviceInfo}, #{ipAddress} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP LIMIT 1
